_comment: Terms that are genres, languages, or generic descriptors -- never a real artist the whitelist should match. A source (Ticketmaster segment/classification names, festival titles) occasionally emits one of these as an event's artist, which then exact-matches a junk whitelist entry and pollutes the published output (a user saw 'Amsterdam', 'Alternative rock', 'Afrikaans' listed as artists). Removal is guarded: clean_denylist.ts never removes anything that also appears in data/artist_scrape_targets.txt, and real-band homonyms (Live, Amsterdam, Berlin, Muse, Yes, Chicago, ...) are deliberately NOT listed here.
